description:
Advances: specled.mix_tasks

Deliverable:
Add lib/mix/tasks/spec.dedup_realized_by.ex (module Mix.Tasks.Spec.DedupRealizedBy). Mirrors mix spec.suggest_binding ergonomics. Flags: --root, --fail-on-dups. NO --write flag. Loads specs via SpecLedEx.detect_spec_dir/1 + SpecLedEx.index/2. Computes duplicates via the shared SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupe.duplicates/1 helper. Prints proposal blocks per subject including a '# already implied by implementation' comment on each removal. Exit code: 0 by default; non-zero with --fail-on-dups when any subject has duplicates.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_dedup_realized_by_test.exs covers proposal block format (single subject, multi-subject ordering), --fail-on-dups semantics, no-dups-clean-exit, '# already implied by implementation' comment present, no --write flag exists.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.tasks.dedup_realized_by_proposal, dedup_realized_by_no_write, dedup_realized_by_exit_code, dedup_realized_by_shared_seam.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/validator/** (S7)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/** (already shipped)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.validate.ex (S7)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.dedup_realized_by.ex (new)
- test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_dedup_realized_by_test.exs (new)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT add a --write flag.
- Do NOT emit findings from the task itself; the validator handles findings.
- Do NOT duplicate the duplicate-detection logic; call RealizedByDedupe.duplicates/1.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S8: mix spec.dedup_realized_by task
